content.explanation: 正确答案 'Thanks, doc. You too!' 是礼貌且符合语境的回应，表达了感谢并回赠祝福。'Okay, see you next time.' 虽然语法正确，但不够礼貌，未回应对方的关心。'I'm fine, thanks.' 是对健康询问的回应，不适用于道别场景。'Yeah, same to you.' 口语化且不够正式，缺乏礼貌用语如 'Thanks' 或 'Appreciate it'。

content.speakerText: Thanks for your help today, Dr. Lee.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢您今天的帮助，李医生。

options.text: Sure, call me if you feel bad.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'No problem, stay healthy!' 是自然、礼貌且符合医疗场景的道别回应，既接受了感谢又表达了关心。'You're welcome, I'm off now.' 显得生硬，且 'I'm off now' 不符合医护与患者之间的礼貌互动。'Sure, call me if you feel bad.' 是建议性语言，不适合用于道别。'Don't mention it, I'm tired.' 传递负面情绪，不合情境。

content.speakerText: You've been so helpful. Have a great day!
content.speakerTextCn: 您真的帮了大忙，祝您今天愉快！

options.text: I'm glad I could help. See you later.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Appreciate it! You too!' 是地道、礼貌且高频使用的道别回应，完美回应了对方的祝福。'Thank you! You as well!' 语法错误，'as well' 不能直接接在 'You' 后面。'I'm glad I could help. See you later.' 是医生对患者说的，不是患者对医生的回应。'Yeah, you too. Bye.' 口语化过重，缺乏礼貌和完整表达。

content.hint: 回应对方关心时，常用 'You too!' 表示回赠祝福
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达（You too! 回赠祝福）

content.hint: 表达感谢时，'appreciate' 比 'like' 更正式、更贴切
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配（appreciate + 名词，表达感激）

content.hint: 道别时常用 'Have a ___ day!' 表达祝福，'great' 是最自然的搭配之一
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达（Have a great/good day!）

expectedAnswers: Appreciate it. Have a good one!
Thank you so much. You take care too!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应了对方的关心并回赠祝福
语言准确性：语法正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：使用了地道口语表达，如 'You too' 或 'Have a good one'
关键词覆盖：包含感谢词（Thanks/Appreciate/Thank you）和祝福回赠（You too/Have a good one）

content.speakerText: We're all set. Thanks for coming in today!
content.speakerTextCn: 一切都好了，谢谢您今天前来就诊！
expectedAnswers: Thank you! I really appreciate your time and care.
Thanks so much! Have a wonderful day!
I'm grateful for your help. Take good care!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了感谢并回应对方的道别
语言准确性：使用了恰当的感谢句式和祝福语
表达自然度：语气真诚，符合医患间礼貌互动习惯
关键词覆盖：包含感谢词和祝福语，如 'appreciate', 'thank you', 'take care', 'have a good day'

content.speakerText: You've been very kind today. Take care!
expectedAnswers: Thank you, that means a lot. You too!
I really appreciate your kindness. Have a peaceful day!
Thanks for everything. Wishing you a great day as well!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否准确回应了对方的善意表达并回赠祝福
语言准确性：句式完整，无语法错误
表达自然度：使用了符合语境的高阶表达，如 'means a lot', 'wishing you'
关键词覆盖：包含感谢词、情感词（kindness, appreciate）和祝福语（You too, have a great day）
